label: Quenched Pike Backroom Loft
description: Quenched Pike Backroom Loft occupies a low-ceilinged chamber above the shop’s soot-dark rafters, reached by a steep internal stair and built into Cindervale’s fractured older masonry. A narrow cot and a rigid trunk stand against riveted iron strapping set into the walls, while a pegged rack for belts and scabbards reflects the premises’ licensed trade. A small shuttered window admits disciplined light through iron bars, and the air retains the permanent tang of oil, char, and quenched steel rising from below.
